programme.title: Portillo's Empire Journey
programme.desc: Michael Portillo visits Jamaica, the Caribbean capital of the Empire, heading to Fort Charles where the Empire enlisted the help of pirates to defend the new territory from the Spanish. At the old naval headquarters, Michael learns how the Royal Navy moved in to replace the pirates as Britain struck a deal with Spain to keep her territories. The island needed a new source of wealth, and found it in the triangular trade as slaves were shipped from Africa to work sugar plantations. In Pinnacle, birthplace of the Rastafari movement, Michael learns how Jamaicans were later inspired to create a new religion.(n)

programme.title: The Funny Thing About
programme.desc: Johnny Vegas presents a whistle-stop tour of awkward, embarrassing and cringeworthy holiday moments, as related by a selection of comedians and celebrities. Johnny's famous contributors skewer the traditional staycation, questioning the perks of rain-drenched British beaches, and whether anyone really likes going camping. Turning their attention further afield, the stars share some of their most memorable holiday tales, including transforming a hotel corridor into one long 'slip-and-slide', the suspicious discovery of a pair of chicken fillets in a swimming pool in Marbella, and a blush-inducing incident involving a naked paragliding session along a Spanish beachfront.(n)

programme.title: Drain the Oceans
programme.sub-title: World's Biggest Battleship: Draining the Ocean
programme.desc: The China Seas are the site of one of the largest naval battles of all time, not to mention a 700-year-old mystery - and technological wonders, both ancient and modern. This documentary uses state-of-the-art sonar technology combined with the latest CGI to reveal the biggest battleship ever put to sea, a deadly ancient weapon and the underwater threat that could destroy the world wide web in an instant.(n)

programme.title: The World's Most Scenic Railway Journeys
programme.desc: The 200-mile Ligne de Cévennes, which travels northwards through the Massif Central to France's volcanic heart - Clermont Ferrand and the spectacular Puy De Dome. The route takes travellers across three incredible historic viaducts, plunges deep underground to explore the area's hidden wildlife and traverses through several impressive valleys. The route winds through one of the world's most spectacular national parks, before reaching its final destination, a collection of 80 dormant volcanoes. Narrated by Bill Nighy.(n)

programme.title: Portillo's Empire Journey
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels to South Africa to explore how the lure of riches led Britain into barbaric wars, dividing the country along racial lines. He visits the crumbling Fort Napier, the British garrison in Natal, where battles were planned and executed against the Zulu people. The white minority devised rules to subdue the native black population, corralling people into squalid townships and offering them menial jobs. Eventual conflict with the descendants of Dutch settlers - Boers - was inevitable. Michael learns how Mohandas Gandhi fought the racial segregation that would later calcify into Apartheid.(n)

programme.title: Ken Dodd in His Own Words
programme.desc: Profile of the late comedian, incorporating footage of some of his best performances alongside archive interviews and contributions from friends, colleagues and fellow comics. The programme reveals how he was inspired by his father's love of variety shows and reveals the truth about the town of Knotty Ash that featured heavily in his act.(n)

programme.title: Harry & Meghan: Two Troubled Years
programme.desc: A look at the events that led to the Duke and Duchess of Sussex stepping back from their roles as senior members of the royal family and split their time between the UK and North America. When Meghan married Harry, she also married everything that went with it. However, it soon became evident that there were issues, that eventually led to the bombshell split. Even as they start their new life, their battle with the tabloids is continuing and getting even more bitter. Will the Sussexes manage to make a go of it outside the firm?(n)

programme.title: Godzilla (1998)
programme.desc: A giant mutant lizard spawned from an atomic test rampages through the streets of New York, defying the combined might of the US Army and Navy as it searches for a quiet place to hatch its eggs. A bookish radiation expert and a shady French secret agent join forces to defeat the creature. Hollywood remake of the Japanese monster adventure, starring Matthew Broderick, Jean Reno, Maria Pitillo and Hank Azaria.(n)

programme.title: Jumanji (1995)
programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Unfortunately, he arrives with a rampaging horde of animals on his heels, leaving only one solution - to finish the game he started all those years ago. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Update
programme.desc: No Details Available.(n)

programme.title: Jumanji (1995)
programme.desc: A man who has been trapped inside a mysterious jungle board game for 26 years is eventually freed when two children start to play it. Unfortunately, he arrives with a rampaging horde of animals on his heels, leaving only one solution - to finish the game he started all those years ago. Fantasy adventure, starring Robin Williams, Kirsten Dunst and Bonnie Hunt.(n)

programme.title: 5 News Weekend
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world.(n)

programme.title: Cruising with Jane McDonald
programme.sub-title: Jane McDonald Cruising the Great Lakes
programme.desc: Jane uncovers a little-known cruise route in the Great Lakes of America and Canada, where she jet-boats across the perilous rapids outside Montreal.(n)

programme.title: The Royal Family at War
programme.sub-title: The Windsors: More Royal Rifts & Feuds
programme.desc: Part two of two. Biographer Penny Junor recalls the rumoured rift between the Queen and the Duchess of Cornwall, Princess Margaret's relationship with divorcee Peter Townsend is assessed, and Prince Philip's falling out with the former Duchess of York is revealed.(n)

programme.title: Princess Margaret: Rebel Without a Crown
programme.desc: A profile of the Queen's younger sister, who was determined to live her life exactly as she wanted, even if that sometimes meant bringing the monarchy into disrepute. As a child she was as a mischievous and rebellious princess who loved being the centre of attention, while when she split up with photographer Anthony Armstrong-Jones she became the first major royal to get divorced so since Henry VIII.(n)

programme.title: The Story of
programme.sub-title: Barbara Windsor: Queen of Carry On & More
programme.desc: Tribute to the actress, exploring her rise to fame in the 1960s as the star of the Carry On films and later renaissance in the 1990s as EastEnders' indomitable landlady Peggy Mitchell. Her life has been as interesting off-screen as on it, from her association with the notorious Kray twins and fiery first marriage to local 'bad boy' Ronnie Knight, to her famously close friendship with Carry On co-star Kenneth Williams and affair with Sid James. Featuring contributions from Michael Sheen, Bernard Cribbins, Ross Kemp, Pam St Clement and June Brown.(n)

programme.title: The Malta Story (1953)
programme.desc: The island of Malta comes under siege during the Second World War, as both Allied and Axis forces see it as vital to their supply lines. A British reconnaissance pilot arrives on the island, and plays a crucial role in defending it from the advancing enemy forces. Drama, starring Alec Guinness, Anthony Steel, Jack Hawkins, Muriel Pavlow and Flora Robson.(n)

programme.title: Ride Lonesome (1959)
programme.desc: A bounty hunter captures young killer Billy John, but his real motive is not the cash reward - he has an old score to settle with his prisoner's brother Frank. As the journey to bring the murderer to justice gets under way, he is counting on a showdown with Frank and accepts the help of two outlaw gunmen for added protection, aware they will try to turn Billy John in themselves for the reward and a pardon. Western, with Randolph Scott, Lee Van Cleef, James Best, James Coburn and Pernell Roberts.(n)

programme.title: Esther Waters (1948)
programme.desc: A kitchen maid succumbs to the advances of a caddish stable lad and falls pregnant - but is abandoned for another woman. Period drama, starring Dirk Bogarde and Kathleen Ryan.(n)

programme.title: The Man from Laramie (1955)
programme.desc: A cavalry officer determines to avenge the death of his brother, but rather than target the Apaches who killed him, he vows to go after the gang who supplied them with their weapons - leading to conflict with the sadistic son of an elderly rancher. Anthony Mann's Western, starring James Stewart, Arthur Kennedy, Donald Crisp and Cathy O'Donnell.(n)

programme.title: Non-Stop (2014)
programme.desc: An air marshal on a transatlantic flight receives mysterious messages in which an anonymous terrorist threatens to kill one passenger every 20 minutes unless a ransom is paid. He searches the plane for the criminals responsible, but his investigation is threatened when he is framed as being the mastermind behind the plot. Action thriller, starring Liam Neeson, Julianne Moore and Lupita Nyong'o.(n)

programme.title: Beast (2017)
programme.desc: Moll Huntingdon works as a Jersey tour guide and lives with her parents, under the strict rules of her controlling mother Hilary. One day she's saved from a sexual assault on the deserted beach by a stranger with a gun. Writer-director Michael Pearce's thriller, starring Jessie Buckley, Johnny Flynn and Geraldine James.(n)

programme.title: A Bigger Splash (2015)
programme.desc: A rock star recovering from surgery retreats to the peaceful surroundings of a Mediterranean island with her lover. Their seclusion is disrupted by the arrival of an old flame and his estranged teenage daughter, and a complex, tempestuous relationship develops between the four of them, bringing old memories to the surface. Drama, starring Tilda Swinton and Ralph Fiennes.(n)

programme.title: Wish I Was Here (2014)
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor struggles to cope with making sense of his life and facing up to his father's deteriorating health. When he realises he cannot afford to send his two children to the Jewish religious school he had in mind, he opts to teach them himself. Comedy drama, directed by and starring Zach Braff, with Kate Hudson and Mandy Patinkin.(n)

programme.title: 7th Cavalry (1956)
programme.desc: An army officer is branded a coward for failing to fight in the Battle of the Little Bighorn, and is unable to convince anyone that official business had detained him. In a bid to repair his damaged reputation, he leads a cavalry detail to retrieve the dead from the battlefield. Western, starring Randolph Scott, Jay C Flippen and Jeanette Nolan.(n)

programme.title: The Way to the Stars (1945)
programme.desc: A naive young pilot is assigned to a British bomber base during the Second World War, and is involved in the opening skirmishes of the Battle of Britain. He encounters the first wave of American recruits to the Allies, and falls for a local girl - but when his squadron leader is killed leaving a wife and child behind, he questions whether he can afford to marry. Drama, starring John Mills and Michael Redgrave.(n)

programme.title: Blanche Fury (1948)
programme.desc: A penniless governess is invited to stay with a wealthy relative, where she hopes to secure her future and take over the estate by marrying her infatuated cousin. However, her secret romance with a stablehand has tragic consequences for all concerned. Drama, starring Valerie Hobson, Michael Gough, Stewart Granger and Walter Fitzgerald.(n)

programme.title: Sword of Sherwood Forest (1960)
programme.desc: Legendary outlaw hero Robin Hood rallies his merry men to thwart a dastardly plan by the Sheriff of Nottingham to murder the Archbishop of Canterbury, who has denounced the sheriff's plot to confiscate another nobleman's land. Medieval adventure, starring Richard Greene, Peter Cushing, Niall MacGinnis, Richard Pasco, Sarah Branch and Oliver Reed.(n)

programme.title: The Fault in Our Stars (2014)
programme.desc: Indianapolis teenager Hazel has terminal thyroid cancer and attends a patients' support group, where she meets fellow teen Gus, who lost a leg to the disease. The two fall in love and a shared passion for books leads them on a literary pilgrimage to Amsterdam in search of reclusive author Peter van Houten. Romantic drama based on the bestselling novel by John Green, starring Shailene Woodley, Ansel Elgort, Laura Dern and Willem Dafoe.(n)

programme.title: Central Intelligence (2016)
programme.desc: Action comedy, starring Dwayne Johnson as a one-time geek who suffered constant humiliation at high school but grew up to be a lethal CIA agent. But when he is targeted by his own organisation, he comes home for a high school reunion, where he enlists the help of the former campus tough guy - now a meek accountant - who very quickly wonders what he has got himself into. Co-starring Kevin Hart and Amy Ryan.(n)

programme.title: The Green Mile (1999)
programme.desc: A convicted child-killer of towering height and massive build is condemned to death row, but astonishes the guards with his good nature and miraculous healing powers. They believe the gentle giant is incapable of crime, and emotions run high as they realise there is no hope of overturning his death sentence. Supernatural drama, based on a novel by Stephen King, starring Tom Hanks, Michael Clarke Duncan, David Morse and Harry Dean Stanton.(n)

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad.(n)

programme.title: Fantastic Voyage (1966)
programme.desc: A medical team is miniaturised and injected into the bloodstream of a scientist to repair his severely damaged brain - unaware that one of the microscopic passengers has sabotage on his mind. Richard Fleischer's sci-fi adventure, starring Raquel Welch, Stephen Boyd, Donald Pleasence and Edmond O'Brien.(n)

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course (2016)
programme.desc: When a cosmic blunder leaves Earth in the path of an asteroid, it's up to Sid the sloth and pals Manny and Diego to save the day. Animated sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo and Simon Pegg.(n)

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel.(n)

programme.title: Super 8 (2011)
programme.desc: A boy and his friends sneak out at night to film an amateur zombie movie, only to witness a train derailment. As people start disappearing from their town and the military descends in force, they come to realise a dangerous alien was being transported on the train and is now on the loose. Sci-fi thriller, starring Joel Courtney and Elle Fanning.(n)

programme.title: The Railway Man (2013)
programme.desc: A traumatised former prisoner of war gets married, but continues to suffer nightmares about his experiences. He is unable to talk to his wife about his time in captivity, so she tracks down a fellow hostage to learn the truth - and discovers the cruel Japanese officer he is fixated on is still alive. Fact-based drama, starring Colin Firth, Nicole Kidman and Stellan Skarsgard.(n)

programme.title: The Raid 2 (2014)
programme.desc: A cop who survived fighting his way through a drug lord's lair is reassigned to undercover duties. He is sent to infiltrate a crime syndicate and expose a connection between the gangsters and corruption on the force, but his personal vendetta threatens to disrupt the mission. Action thriller sequel, starring Iko Uwais and Arifin Putra. In Indonesian, Japanese, English and Arabic.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Russell is forced to move into Timmy's apartment after his mother cuts him off, but begins to make friends with his new neighbours. Audrey offers to flirt with Jeff's boss to increase his chances of earning a bonus, and Adam tries to get Jen to dress more glamorously in bed.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Jeff asks his colleagues to sponsor Audrey in a 10k charity run, but struggles to raise funds having previously refused their own appeals for donations. Meanwhile, Russell is disturbed when a potential love-interest seems to be using a set of strangely familiar tactics to get rid of him.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Roxie and Sabrina land their own show on the campus station, but have trouble thinking of ways to fill the airwaves for two whole hours. Melissa Joan Hart stars.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Salem creates double trouble by accidentally cloning himself, and the god Mercury helps Sabrina's boyfriend Harvey overcome a skating injury - at a price.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Lennox helps Ryder get creative on a job application. Meanwhile, Mel plans the perfect wedding for her friend Carrie (Vicki Davis), but when she suddenly calls off the big day, Mel debates whether she should keep the flowers, catering and venue for her and Joe. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel and Joe meet with their minister to discuss their relationship, and try to prove that everything between them is perfect. However, when they look back on their time together, they decide that honesty is not always the best way. Family comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben and Riley try to make the difficult transition from friends to being a couple, which leads to an embarrassing moment for Riley. Elsewhere, Tucker helps Danny to get over his failed relationship. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Riley begins to wonder whether Ben owes it to himself to give family life with Angela and baby Emma a chance, while Bonnie tries to keep her age a secret when she dates a much younger man. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Chelsea Kane and Derek Theler.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is upset after Lucy runs away in the middle of their date, leaving the gang to cheer him up. However, when Howard bumps into her, she admits she is incredibly shy. Meanwhile, Sheldon asks Penny to help with a new episode of Fun with Flags, and because he is impressed by her acting ability, the friends go to see her in a performance of A Streetcar Named Desire.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the girls go to Disneyland and get made up as princesses, the guys have to promote science as a career option for women at Howard's old middle school. Meanwhile, Raj and Lucy have their first date in a library, where instead of speaking to each other they send text messages.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam joins a mail-order music club, aiming to assemble an enviable cassette tape collection. He takes advantage of the 12 tapes for a penny promotion by opening multiple accounts with the club using fake names to get as much music as possible, but has no intention of continuing the monthly contracts. However, when Beverly discovers the scam she blames Erica. Barry asks Murray for help when he realises Lainey's dad Bill doesn't like him.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired to become a magician, Adam attempts to use his new magic act to attract girls at school, but is thwarted when Beverly insists on taking to the stage as his assistant. Murray is alarmed when Barry refuses to study for a college entrance exam with his peers.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: For his first task back in the field, Jeffords prepares to join Peralta and Boyle on a mission to infiltrate a gym where steroids are being sold illegally, but Peralta begins to have second thoughts about whether the sergeant is ready. Meanwhile, Santiago and Diaz try to determine who has burgled Gina's flat.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a string of hotel robberies together, Peralta is upset to discover Santiago is considering leaving the precinct to work with his rival, the Vulture, in the special crimes unit. Holt and Jeffords try to think up some strategies to make the team more efficient. Featuring a guest appearance by Adam Sandler.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny offer Sheldon's old room to Raj after he is forced to move out of his apartment to save money, leading to unexpected conflict among the gang and some unwanted observations from Leonard's mother. Christine Baranski guests.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Penny and Raj settle into their new living arrangement, but Penny and Raj get along so well together that Leonard starts to feel left out. Sheldon expresses an interest in Amy's work and they begin to collaborate on a scientific project.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe wants to start a family and invites Nate and Gillian round, hoping their baby will be enough to convince Mel she is ready to handle the responsibility. Meanwhile, Lennox plays matchmaker for Zander and Ryder reveals plans to move to Louisiana.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: The family gathers around the laptop to video chat with Ryder in New Orleans on his 18th birthday, but the computer crashes before they get the chance to talk. Joe insists that he can fix it, but Mel is convinced they need to employ an expert to repair it. Dani asks Lennox for advice on matters of the heart but doesn't follow her words of wisdom. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie decides to set Ben up with her friend Bailey, and all seems to be going well until Ben realises his new girlfriend bears similarities to his mother. Meanwhile, Riley and Tucker take a car that belongs to Danny's father out for a spin. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Ben throws Emma a first birthday party at the ice-cream parlour where he and Riley worked as teenagers. However, he runs into an ex-girlfriend with a major secret. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt is taken by surprise when his long-time nemesis, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch (guest star Kyra Sedgwick), arrives to carry out an inspection of his precinct. Peralta and Jeffords test the boundaries between 'work friendship' and 'real friendship' while they investigate a stabbing at a trendy milk bar. Boyle searches for a guest to take to his ex-wife's engagement party - will Diaz come to the rescue?(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: After getting telephone answering machines, Murray and Pop-Pop wage a message war on one another, so Erica, Barry and Pops try to reunite them at a hockey game.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to be a horror writer, but his efforts get him grounded on Halloween when Beverly discovers that she is the basis for the monster in his story. Erica forces Barry to attend a costume dance with her.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is devastated when his mother befriends Penny. Howard and Sheldon bond when they drive into the desert to shoot off a model rocket. Christine Baranski guest stars.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Raj turn to Bernadette for advice about their jealousy when Amy and Howard decide to collaborate on a new project. Penny and Leonard learn some new ways to manage Sheldon's irksome behaviour from an unlikely source.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at another classic episode of the soap. Brendan is a changed man as he openly shows affection towards Ste in Dublin, but there is darkness on the horizon.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dave Benson Phillips' food gets a grilling from Anthea Turner, Marcel Somerville, Amelia Dimoldenberg and AJ Odudu, so he tries to save his evening with a spot of clowning around.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Rival Prodigy and Sir Isaac Neutron
programme.desc: Meemaw intervenes when Sheldon gets jealous of Dr Sturgis bonding with Paige, a rival 10-year-old genius. In the meantime, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Crisis of Faith and Octopus Aliens
programme.desc: Following a tragic accident in the local community, Mary's faith is shaken. Seeing his mother doubt everything she believes, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Zoe Perry.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members partner up for their next Halloween Heist - unaware they have to be handcuffed to each other. But that is just the start of their problems.(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Summer takes up knitting, and when her scarf gets caught in the garage door, it triggers a series of events leading up to the total destruction of the multiverse.(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: Rick, Morty, Beth, Summer and Jerry embark on a galactic adventure. It seems that, for once, nothing can go wrong.(n)

programme.title: Harley Quinn
programme.desc: Harley goes after Gotham's caped crusader Batman, but ends up facing the adolescent Robin instead, making her the laughing stock of the criminal underworld.(n)

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When Morty complains that Rick's adventures are too frightening and traumatic, Rick allows him to lead their next expedition. Rick also provides the family with an inventive solution when they come to him with their trivial problems.(n)

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: The Robot Chicken writers go back to work on a new season, but have to take Fury Road to get to the office. Beavis has moved on from his life with Butt-head, and the Robot Chicken Nerd is the latest guest in Westworld. Weird Al Yankovic guest stars. Animated comedy series, created by Seth Green and Matthew Senreich.(n)

programme.title: Robot Chicken
programme.desc: The Robot Chicken crew wonders whether Doc McStuffins can handle things in the emergency room. Investors are less than thrilled with Westworld's first generation of hosts, and the Scooby gang members tell each other how they really feel - with lethal results. Linda Cardellini, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Matthew Lillard and Freddie Prinze Jr guest star.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson guides two more singletons on the dating show based naked attraction alone. First into the studio is 26-year-old Adele from Scotland. After beating cancer, Adele wants to live life to the full and find a guy who feels the same. She is followed by 22-year-old Jack from Manchester. After a dramatic four-stone weight-loss, Jack wants to show off his new body and attract the one for him.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny finds out Leonard's family never celebrated his birthdays, so she enlists Sheldon's help to organise a surprise party, while Howard gets him out of the way by staging an emergency hospital visit. Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Following the break-up of Penny's relationship, Leonard finally summons up the courage to ask her out. When she accepts, they both turn to Sheldon for advice on how to handle the forthcoming date. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on programmes from May 2016, including Dogs Might Fly, Drive, Marcella, Sex Box, Mastermind and Natural Born Winners. programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Audrey joins Jeff at his company Christmas party, where they compete to see who is funnier. Elsewhere, the friends struggle to understand Russell's efforts to make everyone miserable until he makes a confession about his childhood. David Spade stars.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Josh gets Sabrina an internship as a writer at the newspaper, she tries to keep their relationship a secret so that people won't think she only got the job because she's the photographer's girlfriend. Hilda takes Morgan on a shopping trip to Ancient Rome. Supernatural sitcom, starring Melissa Joan Hart.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Morgan spends all her cash on a shopping spree, so Sabrina, Roxie and Miles join forces to ensure she can pay her share of the rent. Meanwhile, Zelda and Salem join the Other Realm book club, and Hilda goes to a dinner party at Banning's house. Supernatural sitcom, starring Melissa Joan Hart.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel is not so thrilled when Joe's mother Gloria drops by, but her fiance saves his anger for when his estranged brother Tony turns up and expects to be able to stay. Meanwhile, Lennox insists on helping Ryder get into college when he misses the application deadline. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.sub-title: You're the One That I Want
programme.desc: The weekend of Mel and Joe's wedding draws closer, but things are running far from smoothly as Joe is injured at his own bachelor party and Mel's father is missing. Meanwhile, Zander sees his friend make a move on Lennox. Starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Tucker arranges for Danny to take part as a guest on Mary Hart's show, but his TV appearance takes a turn when he becomes emotional during the interview. Meanwhile, Ben and Riley have a misunderstanding about Angela. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: When Riley's company is hired to represent a preacher whose life has been hit by scandal, she is charged with making sure the man's wilful daughter stays out of trouble. Meanwhile, Bonnie's new career in real estate soon hits problems. Comedy, starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam picks a team of popular athletes over his own friends in gym class, his mates seek revenge by forcing their opponents to play a game of Dungeons and Dragons. Murray objects when Erica decides that she wants to go away from home to attend college. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Barry insists that Beverly always favours Adam, she tries to make amends by smothering her oldest son with affection - much to his horror. Murray is not happy about Erica's new boyfriend, a fanatical music fan who is trying to convert her to his way of thinking. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt invites the entire squad to his house to celebrate his birthday, but Jeffords struggles to keep everyone in line, with Peralta and Santiago making a bad impression on their host's husband Kevin. Meanwhile, Boyle's love of food leads to a romantic connection with an older woman, and Diaz introduces Gina to some psychologists - who find her to be a fascinating subject.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle's new girlfriend gives his self-confidence a boost, but Peralta is forced to intervene before his colleague gets too serious, too soon in the relationship. Meanwhile, Diaz and Santiago have trouble taking a costumed crimefighter seriously, and Holt faces a challenge to his leadership.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon pushes himself to the limit when he collaborates on two scientific projects - one with Leonard and Howard, plus another with Amy - on the same day. Bernadette nears the end of her maternity leave, and looks forward to returning to work.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard and Bernadette find it upsetting to leave baby Halley at the nursery when Bernadette returns to work at the end of her maternity leave. The gang's university colleague Bert the geologist introduces them to his attractive new girlfriend Rebecca.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Meld and Joe write thank you cards to everyone who sent them wedding gifts, and pretend to be delighted with a huge, ugly coffee maker given to them by Aunt Bunny and Uncle Bert. Meld makes Joe return the machine to the shop, but then Bunny and Bert pay an unexpected visit to the newlyweds. Lennox is upset when Marco gets an offer he cannot refuse. Valerie Harper (Rhoda) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel discovers that Joe used to be a member of a boy band in his youth, but when she buys Dani a piano to foster her dreams of a musical career, she is surprised to find that Joe is completely opposed to the idea of his daughter attempting to become a musician. Zander tries to keep it a secret from his girlfriend Lilah that he and Lennox are working together.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie realises how much she misses her ex-boyfriend Brad, so enlists Tucker's help to arrange a reunion. However when the former flame announces he still has feelings for her, Ben's misguided advice leads to him making a rash decision. Starring Jean-Luc Bilodeau, Tahj Mowry and Melissa Peterman.(n)

programme.title: Baby Daddy
programme.desc: Bonnie feels unappreciated for all the work she does for the boys and Emma, and decides to go on strike. However, Ben soon realises how much he needs his mother's help, and comes up with a way to get back into her good books.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook
programme.desc: Adam asks his father for money to film his own action movie. Erica and Beverly go clothes shopping, and Erica uses Beverly's sweaters to create her own version of a popular outfit. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone, Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam gets between Murray and Marvin when they go without him to the Philadelphia Thanksgiving Day parade to see KITT from TV show Knight Rider. Beverly invites Lainey and Bill to Thanksgiving dinner so that Barry won't split his time between two households, but her plans soon go awry. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon competes with Wil Wheaton (guest starring as himself) for the role of the new Professor Proton when the scientist's old TV series gets a reboot. Penny looks after Halley when Howard and Bernadette are both put on bed rest.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Bert collaborate on a research project, even though Sheldon is embarrassed to be associated with the study of geology. Penny and Bernadette coach Raj on how to navigate his fledgling relationship with Ruchi. Swati Kapila and Brian Posehn guest star.(n)

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Another chance to see a classic episode. Cheryl is in shock as the realisation sinks in that she's killed her father, and her brother Brendan decides that he must take the blame. Elsewhere, the Savages are reeling from a surprise admission, while Darren has a decision to make.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: TV presenter AJ Odudu plans to wow the fellow celebs with a menu from her Nigerian-Lancashire roots in the hope of bagging the grand for charity. Cue some are biscuit comparisons and the group members discovering each other's worst childhood moments - with celeb coming clean about their prized collection of photos that got them in big trouble and another declaring they weren't always a goody-two-shoes.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As part of the relationship agreement, Sheldon reluctantly has to take care of Amy when she gets sick, but she loves the extra attention so much she pretends to remain in poor health. Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father.(n)

programme.title: Taken 3 (2014)
programme.desc: In the final part of the blockbusting big-screen trilogy, ex-CIA agent Bryan Mills' efforts to finally live a quiet life are shattered by the death of his ex-wife, Lenore. Just when things seemingly can't get any worse, he is framed for her murder and must fight to clear his name. Taken 2 director Olivier Megaton returns for this action thriller sequel, starring Liam Neeson, Forest Whitaker, Maggie Grace and Dougray Scott.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert.(n)

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 24-year-old beautician Gemma from West Sussex. She has dated a few love rats and is now searching for her Prince Charming. She is followed by 28-year-old bisexual tattoo artist Jennafer, who is fed up of men and now wants to find the perfect woman. Will any of the contestants be just what Jennafer is looking for?(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The nation's favourite armchair critics share their opinions on what they watched in April, 2016, capturing their instant reactions to Britain's Got Talent, Indian Summers, Millionaires' Mansions: Designing Britain's Most Exclusive Homes, Bake Off: Creme de la Creme, Die Hard and the news.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show, with regular Rob Beckett and guest captain Sara Pascoe joined by Oti Mabuse, Rylan Clark-Neal, Russell Kane and Maisie Adam.(n)

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Something unprecedented happens in the First Dates restaurant tonight. When stunning 25-year-old Sasha is stood up, an unexpected knight in shining armour is waiting in the wings - waiter Sam. Meanwhile, 38-year-old sales manager Scott, who is looking for someone to mend his broken heart after the failure of an eight-year relationship, meets 28-year-old PA Victoria, and 55-year-old receptionist Debbie has her first date with a woman, in the shape of 59-year-old divorced security guard Ann.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette and Howard host a dinner party, but as it falls on Sheldon's Thai food night, he opts to bring his own dinner. As punishment for his lack of manners, the gang decides he should organise Wolowitz's cluttered wardrobe, but he discovers an unopened letter from Howard's father, who hasn't made contact in years.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The guys compete for a tenured professor position at the university, leading them to try to win over the committee in charge of appointing a new staff member, and arguing about who deserves the spot the most. However, the panel includes Mrs Davis from Human Resources, whom Sheldon has crossed paths with before. Guest starring Regina King.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: When Josh gets Sabrina an internship as a writer at the newspaper, she tries to keep their relationship a secret so that people won't think she only got the job because she's the photographer's girlfriend. Hilda takes Morgan on a shopping trip to Ancient Rome. Supernatural sitcom, starring Melissa Joan Hart.(n)

programme.title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
programme.desc: Morgan spends all her cash on a shopping spree, so Sabrina, Roxie and Miles join forces to ensure she can pay her share of the rent. Meanwhile, Zelda and Salem join the Other Realm book club, and Hilda goes to a dinner party at Banning's house. Supernatural sitcom, starring Melissa Joan Hart.(n)

programme.title: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: Following the collapse of Audrey's cookie business, Jeff is unable to get out of the retail unit lease so he and Adam invent a new game involving the heads of mannequins. Elsewhere, Russell and Timmy go on a double date. Comedy, starring Patrick Warburton and Oliver Hudson.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to floundering soul food restaurant Blackberry's in Plainfield, New Jersey, but struggles to get his message across to indomitable owner Shelley. Her refusal to deal with the truth comes to a head when Gordon finds a dead mouse in the doorway, prompting him to step up his efforts to change her ways.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay is in New Jersey to help Rose Leone, who spent two years in a coma and came out of hospital to learn her son Michael had run her once-thriving Italian restaurant into the ground. With a menu of more than 126 dishes, the quality of the food is suffering, and even the chefs refuse to eat their own creations.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties.(n)

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Craig decides to plan an Oktoberfest-themed wedding, but his uncompromising fiancee Sofia dreams of a boho beach wedding day.(n)

programme.title: Horton Hears a Who! (2008)
programme.desc: A kindly elephant hears a cry of help coming from a speck of dust and discovers the minuscule city of Whoville. As he tries to help its citizens, the other animals begin to question his sanity, and the evil Kangaroo incites them to turn against the do-gooder. Animated adaptation of Dr Seuss's book, with the voices of Jim Carrey, Steve Carell, Carol Burnett, Seth Rogen and Will Arnett.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam picks a team of popular athletes over his own friends in gym class, his mates seek revenge by forcing their opponents to play a game of Dungeons and Dragons. Murray objects when Erica decides that she wants to go away from home to attend college. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Barry insists that Beverly always favours Adam, she tries to make amends by smothering her oldest son with affection - much to his horror. Murray is not happy about Erica's new boyfriend, a fanatical music fan who is trying to convert her to his way of thinking. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica forget to buy Beverly a Mother's Day gift and make last-minute 'Mom Coupons' instead. Understandably hurt, Beverly gets her revenge by cashing in every coupon they have made in one go. Adam yearns to go to a summer camp for junior astronauts and accuses his father of crushing his dreams when he isn't keen to give permission.(n)

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's favourite shirt is hated by both his mother Beverly and his girlfriend Lainey, so they hatch a plan together to destroy it. However, once the shirt goes missing, Barry asks Adam and Erica to investigate. Murray decides to tear down the family tree house, leaving Adam distraught.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate a serial killer who poses a severe danger to the public. Captain Holt continues to spar with his rival, Commissioner Kelly. Jeffords must deal with some complications resulting from his recent news about his lieutenant's exam.(n)

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members partner up for their next Halloween Heist - unaware they have to be handcuffed to each other. But that is just the start of their problems.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Rival Prodigy and Sir Isaac Neutron
programme.desc: Meemaw intervenes when Sheldon gets jealous of Dr Sturgis bonding with Paige, a rival 10-year-old genius. In the meantime, Mary invites Paige's family over for a play date.(n)

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Crisis of Faith and Octopus Aliens
programme.desc: Following a tragic accident in the local community, Mary's faith is shaken. Seeing his mother doubt everything she believes, Sheldon becomes an unlikely ally. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage and Zoe Perry.(n)

programme.title: Paddington (2014)
programme.desc: An earthquake forces a bear from the Peruvian jungle to start a new life in London. He finds modern Britain to be very different from the stories told to him by his aunt, but makes a new home with a kindly family. However, a sinister taxidermist intends to turn him into a museum exhibit. Comedy based on Michael Bond's series of children's books, starring Hugh Bonneville, Sally Hawkins and Nicole Kidman, with the voice of Ben Whishaw.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj's parents set him up on a blind date in the hope of initiating an arranged marriage, but after a promising start it becomes apparent that the girl in question is more interested in Sheldon. Meanwhile, Penny begins her new job as a bartender. Starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldon receive an invitation to present their research to a physics conference, but Sheldon's reluctance to pander to his peers causes conflict between the friends. An intervention by Penny makes matters worse. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Leonard invent excuses to avoid having to attend Penny's performance in a production of the stage musical Rent, but maintaining the pretence makes matters increasingly complicated. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with DJ Qualls.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon falls ill, and his friends decide to go to a Planet of the Apes movie marathon to keep their distance, knowing he will be in a terrible mood. However, an unsuspecting Penny offers to nurse him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon feels undermined when his parking space at the university is allocated to Howard instead, and his determination to cling on to the spot causes a rift in the pair's friendship. However, the battle between the boys pales in comparison to that waged by Amy and Bernadette, whose disagreement on behalf of their significant others becomes increasingly personal. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Simon Helberg.(n)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

Elsewhere, Howard tries to get some tips on manliness from Penny when he and Bernadette go to visit her father.(n)

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues (2013)
programme.desc: Arrogant newsreader Ron Burgundy's career is rescued from a drunken slump by an executive for a new 24-hour news channel. Reassembling his team of sidekicks, he swiftly rises from the network's graveyard to become its biggest star with a run of ludicrously sensationalist broadcasts. Comedy sequel, starring Will Ferrell, Christina Applegate, Paul Rudd and Steve Carell.(n)

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox USA
programme.desc: A rolling cast of famous faces in the US critique the week's TV, including Ultimate Tag, 2020 Beverley Hills Dog Show and Deadliest Catch.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Handmade Treasures
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp enters the shortbread competition at the Chagford Show in Devon, as she tries to woo the judges with some creative takes on the classic treat, including using rosemary and lavender as ingredients.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: With retirement five years away, Graham and Janet Gifford, from Wigan, want to buy a holiday home that they can eventually relocate to permanently in the Italian region of Liguria. Armed with a budget of £80,000, Sara Damergi helps the couple navigate the Italian property market.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Max McMurdo restore and upcycle 2CV headlamps, a children's rocking horse, a Victorian streetlamp and a high chair.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien explore a fairground, and collect a bicycle made for two, a ship's search lamp and a lambing chair.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Surrey couple Debbie and Simon move into their fairy-tale castle, while Belinda and Lee expand their events portfolio by hosting a classic car weekend.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton is in rural Cambridgeshire with Christine and Frank, a couple determined to build a huge barn-style home fit for big family get-togethers.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Simon White and Shirley Boyle, owners of the Old Hall Country House in Madeley, Cheshire, host the week's first round of the B&B competition. The guests are impressed by the 16th-century building, and are taken tap-dancing and to a private fine-dining restaurant, but one of them is dissatisfied with her bedroom's layout and the garnish on her eggs at breakfast.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Eileen Finn invites her fellow contestants to the four-star Thornley House in Allendale, Northumberland, for the second round of the contest, but struggles to follow the impressive first event. The hostess's pet cats are not to all of her guests' liking, and with activities including a tour of a feline cemetery, the theme for the stay is made abundantly clear.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Jessica and Adrian Rashleigh are the third hosts, at their three-bedroom establishment Chy Conyn in St Ives, Cornwall. For the activity they arrange a magical mystery camper van tour of the local sights. Some of the guests struggle with the small breakfast room but the food is a success, and Eileen Finn demonstrates her karate skills on the men.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final stay is at the Cavendish in Bournemouth, run by Tim and Karen Sturgess. On arrival, the competitors are impressed by the 'pink palace', but things go downhill when a bed is broken and one couple are allocated a room next to the front door. However, Eileen is delighted by the feline memorabilia in her room and the group enjoys a spot of indoor paint-balling and an open-top bus tour of the resort.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Simon White of Old Hall Country House is surprised by an overpayment and Eileen Finn from the four-star Thornley receives tough criticism, before the winner is announced.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien are in Northamptonshire and Coventry, where Henry discovers a rare limited edition Honda Goldwing motorbike with only 65 miles on the clock.(n)

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales go to Ireland and travel along the Shannon Erne Waterway, a canal linking Northern Ireland with the Republic of Ireland. Along the way, they try some traditional dancing and folk singing, visit historic sites including Crom Castle and Bloody Pass, and meet a genealogist with a fascinating story to tell.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: In northern France, Wendy and Marcus start renovating their chateau's barn into a space fit for a wedding venue. Debbie and Simon test run a possible new business venture by hosting a Chinese cooking weekend for their visiting family. Meanwhile, in a bid to top up their renovation funds, Belinda and Lee plan to host a fashion show by their swimming pool, but find wet weather threatens to stop play.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud looks at the transformation of a derelict mill cottage in Northumberland into a contemporary family home, the longest-running project ever featured on the programme. Stefan Lepkowski and Ania Shabowska began work in 2006, and their ambitious plans involved restoring the Georgian building, reconstructing a watermill and adding a steel-and-glass atrium, but their budget of £250,000 was completely inadequate.(n)

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and Claire face a series of unexpected challenges as they establish their homestead on Fraser's Ridge. Period drama, starring Caitriona Balfe and Sam Heughan.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and David Mitchell take on guest captain Joe Wilkinson and Roisin Conaty. Tom Allen joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner and Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.sub-title: Are You Right There, Father Ted?
programme.desc: The priest offends Craggy Island's Chinese community and pulls out all the stops to convince them that he is not racist - but his efforts end in disaster. Sitcom, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn, with Ozzie Yue.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The cleric tries to nurture Chris, the hot favourite to win the King of the Sheep festival, back to top form after he is left shaken by a terrifying encounter. Meanwhile, Dougal becomes convinced Craggy Island is being terrorised by a monster.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Niki, 34, is airlifted to St George's after crashing into another rider during a charity bike ride between London and Brighton. While staff try to contact Niki's wife Phill, who is almost 300 miles away at their home in the north east of England, 90-year-old Peter is rushed to A&E with severe blood poisoning.(n)

programme.title: Shocking Emergency Calls
programme.desc: Documentary telling the story of the day a gunman entered a bank in Cincinnati and opened fire, featuring the calls made by those caught up in the atrocity.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.sub-title: Are You Right There, Father Ted?
programme.desc: The priest offends Craggy Island's Chinese community and pulls out all the stops to convince them that he is not racist - but his efforts end in disaster. Sitcom, starring Dermot Morgan, Ardal O'Hanlon, Frank Kelly and Pauline McLynn, with Ozzie Yue.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: The cleric tries to nurture Chris, the hot favourite to win the King of the Sheep festival, back to top form after he is left shaken by a terrifying encounter. Meanwhile, Dougal becomes convinced Craggy Island is being terrorised by a monster.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty visits the largest wholesale food market in the world in Paris and discovers why British cheese sales are soaring across Europe. Matt Tebbutt travels to one of the largest ham producers in Italy and meets a pig farmer who tells him about a delicate problem that all pork producers face, while Kate Quilton investigates why some limes are so much juicier than others.(n)

programme.title: Kirstie's Vintage Gems
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp helps man to create a fun bedroom for his two daughters. She creates a pinboard using a bold vintage fabric, and a garland from the felt offcuts. Plus, the girls help to personalise some jewellery boxes.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Gloucestershire couple Helen and Charles Taverner are looking for a holiday home on Lake Como that they can spend some money, time and love on. Sara Damergi leaves no stone unturned showing the couple how far their budget of £50,000 will stretch in this desirable part of Italy.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Gloucestershire, Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien visit landed gent Sir Benjamin Slade as they search for more upcycling prospects. Simon converts a gilded picture frame into a flat-screen TV surround, while Henry refurbishes a club fender fire surround and turns a quick profit on a Fordson tractor.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien find, fix and flog unwanted possessions on behalf of their owners. Henry and Simon realise profit potential in an old crop sprayer, a cast iron fire guard and some old wooden workshop clamps.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY

Meanwhile, in a bid to top up their renovation funds, Belinda and Lee plan to host a fashion show by their swimming pool, but find wet weather threatens to stop play.(n)

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton heads to West Sussex to meet Med and Chandni, who are aiming to build a sizeable four-bed home on a minuscule budget by doing most of the work themselves. Med's never self-built before and he soon discovers that determination and blind optimism will only get you so far. As the project spirals out of control, can this couple really deliver the stylish home they crave?(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mark and Kathy Domaille, owners of Godshill Park Farm on the Isle of Wight, host the week's first round of the B&B competition and invite their guests to take part in clay pigeon shooting. However, dust behind bath taps, a lack of coat-hangers and a breakfast that does not meet expectations take the shine off their stay.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Teresa and Clive, owners of the Butterfly Guest House in Porthcawl, south Wales, host the next round of the competition, but their status as beginners is confirmed when one couple find hairs in the bathroom. Another pair are shocked to discover there is no view of the sea from their window, but things liven up when the guests go bowling and attend a surprise karaoke party.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to Kalpana and Joseph's four-star townhouse in Blackpool, the Address. Cumbrian farmers Ruth and Mike are unhappy their room overlooks a car park and security light, and a trip to the Pleasure Beach results in Teresa calling Mark and Kathy a miserable couple.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competitors head to Cumbria to visit Mike and Ruth's four-star gold-rated Crake Trees Manor. Two of the guests are looking forward to their stay in the plush building, until they discover they have been allocated outdoor accommodation without electricity, water or a toilet.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Mark and Kathy of Godshill Park Farm receive some underpayments, and accusations of game-playing abound before the week's winner is announced.(n)

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Northamptonshire in search of more upcycling prospects. Simon finds some night vision goggles and an antique snooker table that's seen better days, while Henry chooses an enormous US army truck as one of his picks.(n)

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales embark on more waterway adventures. This time, they head into uncharted waters to attempt one of the longest canal journeys in the world - 350 miles coast to coast across Sweden. The first leg of their voyage begins in Gothenburg, where they link up with the historic Gota Canal, taking them into the heart of the Scandinavian country and toward the Baltic Sea.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Wendy and Marcus aim to finish their newly renovated wedding barn for a VIP visit from the local mayor. In the Ardèche, chateau owners Amy and Marc have big plans to turn two of their outbuildings into a yoga studio and café to kick-start their fledgling business of running a restorative retreat centre. Meanwhile, Belinda and Lee's hopes of giving their donjon a much-needed facelift start to fade as a concrete delivery fails to work upon arrival.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets Paul and Penny Denby, who are demolishing their mock-Georgian home on an exclusive south London estate to replace it with a contemporary mansion. The couple have little building experience and struggle with the dozens of design decisions they must make, and find themselves £250,000 short of the amount needed to finish the property.(n)

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: Valeria is on the warpath against Giorgio after the discovery of how he used Viola. However, she must put personal issues aside as the team has another case to solve. A young pregnant girl has been found dead after an apparent desperate attempt to escape from a sect known as The Daughters of Maat. Her friend, who helped her escape, is in a state of terrified shock. The more Valeria digs, the darker the truth of the sect's secrets becomes. Crime drama, with Miriam Leone. In Italian.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Consultant Will is concerned about potential spinal and head injuries when 63-year-old Valerie is rushed to St George's after falling from a horse, while 30-year-old Natasha has had an accident while trampolining at her son Taelan's eighth birthday party.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras focus on the ups and downs of family life and how people pull together to get through them. Among the patients is Pam, 53, who is admitted to A&E after suffering a suspected heart attack. There's also a profile of 10-year-old Cora, who is rushed to St George's after being thrown from a horse into the branches of a tree.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Handlebar, Casa Roma and The Black Pearl
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits three previous restaurants he tried to save - Handlebar, Casa Roma and the Black Pearl - to find out whether his advice has been put to good use.(n)

programme.desc: Consultant Will is concerned about potential spinal and head injuries when 63-year-old Valerie is rushed to St George's after falling from a horse, while 30-year-old Natasha has had an accident while trampolining at her son Taelan's eighth birthday party.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Cameras focus on the ups and downs of family life and how people pull together to get through them. Among the patients is Pam, 53, who is admitted to A&E after suffering a suspected heart attack. There's also a profile of 10-year-old Cora, who is rushed to St George's after being thrown from a horse into the branches of a tree.(n)

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: Jimmy Doherty looks into skyr, a mysterious yoghurt-like product that claims to be entirely fat-free, but has a surprisingly creamy texture, and Kate Quilton heads to one of the busiest oyster hatcheries in France, where she witnesses the amazing science that goes into providing oysters year-round. Matt Tebbutt wants to know if the dried strawberries in his cereal are real or just a clever imitation.(n)

programme.title: River Cottage Bites
programme.desc: Head gardener Mark Diacono provides a step-by-step guide to planning a vegetable patch, and shows how people can save money by growing their own produce, expanding their culinary horizons and providing the freshest produce around.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Graham and Dawn Tucker love the beautiful Italian region of Le Marche and want to buy a perfect home from home there. With a budget of £160,000, Sara Damergi searches every nook and cranny of the local property market to help the couple find their ideal retreat.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Long-time friends Jackie Venn and Jane Howes adore Italy and have pooled together all their savings seeking a renovation project in the region of Abruzzo. They want a substantial property offering views, olive trees and a layout that suits their different needs, so turn to property expert Sara Damergi to help them achieve their objectives.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Summer Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas comes to the aid of Neil Masey and Affy Wajid, a Brighton-based couple seeking to pick up a holiday home on Ibiza. The pair hope that setting up house will allow them to enjoy the island's party lifestyle, while also having a place where they can entertain friends and begin their explorations of the Mediterranean landscape.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer search Hampshire, Wiltshire and Surrey as they try to find homes for this week's couples. Retirees Sheila and Jason are living out of boxes after selling their home in Morecambe and now they just want to be nearer their families, while Sue and Alan have moved back from Australia, only to find their generous budget of £450,000 does not stretch to the spacious apartment they had Down Under - and getting them to downsize could prove an uphill struggle for Phil.(n)

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.sub-title: Miniature Classics and a Towering Retro FavouriteMiniature Classics and a Towering Retro Favourite
programme.desc: Liam Charles and Tom Allen present 12 professional duos with two challenges. For the first round, they must produce two different types of miniature classics - strawberry tarts and fruit salad. For the second challenge, they must reinvent pineapple upside-down cake and transform it into an incredible fine-dining experience, complete with towering edible showpiece sculptures.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Marlon Williams hosts the first party in Oxford, and hopes his love-island-themed evening will be enough to win him the £1,000 prize at the end of the week. However, after a shambolic start to proceedings, the night ends with the smashing of plates.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Inventor Richard Berrecloth hosts the second dinner party in Oxford, and hopes to impress his guests with home-made food and an unusual form of entertainment. However, Heidi Kelloway and Marlon Williams appear to be more interested in each other than their host's hospitality - while another diner seems rather too keen on sampling the wine.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Mother-of-three Victoria Collett hosts the third dinner party in Oxford and begins the day with a hangover and a few culinary disasters. It is not long before her guests start grumbling and Richard Berrecloth criticises her seafood starter, so she pins her hopes on the Caribbean curry being a success.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dog trainer James Hearle hosts the fourth dinner party in Oxford, but his four-legged friends threaten to turn the evening into a mess. Tempers also rise between the guests as culinary critic Richard Berrecloth continues shocking the group with his brutal honesty.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Heidi Kelloway hosts the final dinner party in Oxford, determined to lighten the mood of the other diners. However, the evening turns sour when the diners confront the overly critical Richard Berrecloth about his frank comments, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Owner Helen Marriott offers her guest a chance to 'step off the planet' and treats them to essential breathing lessons, a chance to get to know one another in the hot tub, and soul-soothing foot massages at the Fountains Court Holistic Health Hotel in the North Yorkshire resort of Scarborough.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants head to the Whittington & Cat, a pub in Hull that also offers B&B. Proprietor Sue Perkins treats her guests to an afternoon of ice hockey, but they are intrigued by the possible contents of her peculiarly titled breakfast menu.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Khurram Saba hosts the third night of the competition at his Saba Hotel in west London and finds his guests are expecting metropolitan chic, and certainly not fish and chips for dinner. Candida Leaver is extremely displeased when she experiences a sleepless night, while Sue Perkins and Gill take the opportunity to go out and have some fun.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Candida Leaver and Peter Starling, owners of the Bower Inn in Bridgwater, Somerset, play host in the last round of the week. The group activity is willow-weaving, and at dinner time the guests reveal what they think of their no-nonsense hosts.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to learn how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers before discovering who has won the week's competition. Old tensions resurface as the results are announced, and there are heated exchanges around the table.(n)

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows a project by artists Freddie Robins and Ben Coode-Adams to convert a large, Grade II-listed timber-framed barn in Essex into a family home and workspace. Their plans involve a minimal number of interior walls to display their collection of toys, but at seven times the size of an average three-bedroom house, the transformation of the 500-year-old building proves extremely challenging.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Staff and patients at St George's in south west London talk about the importance of family support when dealing with difficult circumstances. Fifty-one-year-old painter and decorator Gary is rushed to St George's after falling 10 feet from a ladder. Cameras also follow five-year-old Beatriz, who has symptoms of a fever. She has a rare kidney condition that affects her immune system, making her vulnerable to infection.(n)

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Forty-year-old Adrian crashed his bike into a car and may have a serious chest injury requiring emergency surgery, so he makes a heartfelt phone call to his wife Lili - who is 1,400 miles away in Montenegro. Meanwhile, Steve, 49, was encouraged to go to A&E by his wife Julia when his heart rate more than doubled in an hour while preparing supper, and doctors try to determine whether his accelerated heart is connected to his recent stroke and whether he is at risk of having another.(n)

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Dougal takes over as Craggy Island's new milkman, but his predecessor, local womaniser Pat Mustard, returns to exact an explosive revenge on Ted for getting him sacked. Starring Ardal O'Hanlon and Dermot Morgan.(n)

Jeremy Clarkson and James May join forces to create a public information film to promote safer cycling, with their efforts presented to a panel of experts including members of Westminster Council and Olympic gold medal-winning rider Chris Boardman. programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: Lee Mack's not having much luck with lights these days, whether it's the fizzling sign at the start of this show, the blackout during his recent Sheffield gig, or the dimly lit area at the start of this seventh series. Lee and Lucy have enjoyed a spot of culture at their local cinema, but the sparkle of a French movie is soon diminished when the romantic walk home finds them in an imposing underpass. She has her handbag stolen by a bunch of cocky youths from under his nose. Given the fact the layabout failed to protect her, or come up with an accurate description of their muggers, Lee feels the urge to prove his manliness, but will a spell at the local boxing ring be a help or a hindrance? Sally Bretton and Katy Wix also star.(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
programme.desc: A wealthy new couple move into the block and soon find out that sharing a building with Lee and Lucy is anything but straightforward. The fun begins when Lee somehow manages to bag an invitation to a christening party being thrown by the couple - sending him and Lucy on a last-minute gift-buying trip, during which they make every wrong decision humanly possible to find the perfect present for the baby who seems to have everything. Hugh Dennis and Abigail Cruttenden join the cast, with Lee Mack, Sally Bretton and Katy Wix.(n)

programme.title: Not Going Out
